# Contract: SEO Outputs

**Version**: 1.0.0
**Owner**: `astro.config.mjs`, `src/pages/rss.xml.ts`, `src/layouts/BaseLayout.astro`

This document defines the expected output contracts for sitemap, RSS feed, and
OpenGraph/meta tags. These outputs are consumed by search engines, RSS readers,
and social platforms — they represent the site's external interface.

---

## Sitemap

**URL**: `https://thronebuilder.com/sitemap-index.xml`

**Generated by**: `@astrojs/sitemap` Astro integration

**Format**: XML Sitemap Index (sitemaps.org protocol), pointing to
`sitemap-0.xml` (or additional shards for large sites).

**Validation**: Must pass [https://www.xml-sitemaps.com/validate-xml-sitemap.html]
without errors.

### Expected content

Every published page on the site MUST appear in the sitemap, including:
- Homepage (`/`)
- All article pages (`/blog/YYYY-MM-DD-slug/`)

Draft articles (not committed to `main`) MUST NOT appear.

### Sample entry

```xml
<url>
  <loc>https://thronebuilder.com/blog/2026-05-26-welcome-to-thronebuilder/</loc>
  <lastmod>2026-05-26</lastmod>
</url>
```

---

## RSS Feed

**URL**: `https://thronebuilder.com/rss.xml`

**Generated by**: `src/pages/rss.xml.ts` using `@astrojs/rss`

**Format**: RSS 2.0

**Validation**: Must be valid RSS 2.0 per [https://validator.w3.org/feed/].

### Channel metadata

| Field | Value source |
|-------|-------------|
| `<title>` | `SITE_TITLE` from `src/consts.ts` |
| `<description>` | `SITE_DESCRIPTION` from `src/consts.ts` |
| `<link>` | `SITE_URL` from `src/consts.ts` |

### Per-item fields

| RSS field | Source |
|-----------|--------|
| `<title>` | Article `title` frontmatter |
| `<link>` | `SITE_URL + /blog/ + slug + /` |
| `<pubDate>` | Article `pubDate` frontmatter (RFC 822 format) |
| `<description>` | Article `description` frontmatter |
| `<guid>` | Same as `<link>` (unique per article) |

---

## OpenGraph Meta Tags

**Rendered by**: `src/layouts/BaseLayout.astro`

Every page MUST render the following `<meta>` tags in `<head>`:

| Tag | Article pages | Homepage |
|-----|---------------|----------|
| `og:title` | Article `title` | `SITE_TITLE` |
| `og:description` | Article `description` | `SITE_DESCRIPTION` |
| `og:image` | `coverImage` or `DEFAULT_OG_IMAGE` | `DEFAULT_OG_IMAGE` |
| `og:url` | Canonical article URL | `SITE_URL` |
| `og:type` | `article` | `website` |
| `twitter:card` | `summary_large_image` | `summary_large_image` |

### Standard meta tags (also required on every page)

| Tag | Value |
|-----|-------|
| `<title>` | `{page title} — {SITE_TITLE}` (article) / `{SITE_TITLE}` (home) |
| `<meta name="description">` | Same as `og:description` |
| `<link rel="canonical">` | Absolute canonical URL of the current page |

### `og:image` fallback chain

```
article.coverImage (if present and valid)
  → ELSE DEFAULT_OG_IMAGE (/images/og-default.png)
```

The default OG image MUST be:
- Stored at `public/images/og-default.png`
- Dimensions: 1200×630 px (standard OG image size)
- File size: under 1 MB

---

## `<link rel="alternate">` RSS Discovery

The `<head>` of every page MUST include:

```html
<link
  rel="alternate"
  type="application/rss+xml"
  title="ThroneBuilder RSS Feed"
  href="/rss.xml"
/>
```

This enables browsers and feed readers to auto-discover the RSS feed.
